opening: The void has prepared the following statement:
From somewhere beneath the acceptable layer of reality:
The entity that watches from the edge of your peripheral vision would like you to know:
Before the stars go out, consider:
Something has been waiting a very long time to tell you this:
The archive of forgotten things has been updated:
A message, left in a place you were never supposed to find:
The document was not meant to survive, and yet:
From the desk of whatever it is that makes the floorboards settle at 3am:
The following was transcribed before the witness could be reasoned with:
closing: Do not look for the source.
This information will not help you.
It was always going to end this way.
The correct response is to continue as normal.
You have been informed. That is the most anyone can offer.
Whatever you felt just now is probably fine.
There is no follow-up question that leads anywhere good.
The thing responsible for this has already forgotten you.
None of this changes what you have to do tomorrow.
